g.title: pwiz_module_detail
g.text: one node per .cpp/.hpp pair (test fixtures omitted); each group is its own row, top-to-bottom

a.xlink:title: Element / Formula / Mass arithmetic. Ported as Util/Chemistry/Formula.cs + Element*.cs + PhysicalConstants.cs. Generated 118-element table from cpp via Chemistry/generate_elements.py.
Generated isotope masses + abundances for all 118 elements. Ported as Util/Chemistry/ChemistryData.generated.cs.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
m/z-from-mass-and-charge helpers. Ported as Util/Chemistry/Ion.cs.
Isotope-envelope distribution calculator. Ported as Util/Chemistry/IsotopeCalculator.cs.
Statistical fit of isotope-envelope shapes. NOT PORTED — no current consumer.
Per-element isotope table. Ported as Util/Chemistry/IsotopeTable.cs.
m/z tolerance ppm/Da arithmetic. Ported as Util/Chemistry/MZTolerance.cs.
(m/z, ion-mobility) window math. NOT PORTED.
Small command-line tool. SKIPPED.
Tiny CLI helper. SKIPPED.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Use System.Convert.ToBase64String / Buffers.Text.Base64. SKIPPED.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Use MathNet.Numerics.LinearAlgebra. NOT PORTED.
Tiny (x,y) struct. NOT PORTED — System.ValueTuple covers.
3-point parabola fit (peak-centroiding). Ported as Util/Math/Parabola.cs.
Mean/variance/percentile helpers. NOT PORTED — MathNet.Numerics covers the use cases.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Use System.Math.Erf (.NET 5+). SKIPPED.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Use System.Math.Round. SKIPPED.
Use byte[] / Span<byte>. SKIPPED.
Image I/O (BMP/PNG output for peakpicking debug). NOT PORTED.
COM apartment init. SKIPPED.
Char-keyed bitmap. SKIPPED — replaced by Dictionary<char,T>.
Vendor-license EULA prompt at build time. SKIPPED — handled by build scripts.
C++ STL container alias header. N/A. SKIPPED.
Use System.DateTime + System.DateTimeOffset. SKIPPED.
Use System.Environment. SKIPPED.
Use System exception types. SKIPPED.
DLL_EXPORT/IMPORT macros. N/A. SKIPPED.
Use System.IO.Path / Directory / File. SKIPPED.
Windows Installer detection. SKIPPED.
Thread-safe one-shot init. Use Lazy<T> / static ctor. SKIPPED.
Use System.Security.Cryptography.SHA1. SKIPPED.
stdout-tee SHA1 stream — covered by HashingCountingStream in MsData. SKIPPED.
Use static / DI / Lazy<T>. SKIPPED.
C++ namespace alias header (using std::...). N/A in C#. SKIPPED.
Use System.IO streams. SKIPPED.
Use System.String + System.Text. SKIPPED.
Use System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch. SKIPPED.
COM SAFEARRAY interop helper. N/A in pwiz-sharp. SKIPPED.
C++/CLI marshaling helpers (ToStdString etc.). SKIPPED — pwiz-sharp has no CLI bridge.
Use System.Buffers.Binary.BinaryPrimitives. SKIPPED.
mzd-format helper. SKIPPED.
Boost lexical_cast tuning. SKIPPED — use BCL parse methods.
CLI wrapper around SHA1Calculator. SKIPPED.
Thread-safe map wrapper. SKIPPED — use ConcurrentDictionary.
Parallel-array sort. SKIPPED — use indexed Array.Sort with comparator.
Use System.Span<T>. SKIPPED.
C++ unit-test framework. SKIPPED — replaced by MSTest.
Polymorphic map. SKIPPED.
Sparse integer set with range arithmetic. Ported as Util/IntegerSet.cs.
Use System.Xml.XmlReader. SKIPPED.
Progress listener interface + registry. Ported as Util/Misc/IterationListener.cs (IIterationListener + IterationListenerRegistry).
Streaming SHA-1 helper. Ported as Util/Sha1Calculator.cs.
Generic TSV reader. NOT PORTED — call sites use Sciex CSV reader instead.

Round-trip harness: reads vendor file, normalizes, diffs against reference mzML. Ported as test/Pwiz.TestHarness/VendorReaderTestHarness.cs. Drives every vendor fixture test (Reader_Bruker_*, Reader_Thermo_*, …).
Floating-point epsilon compare. Ported as Util/Math/FloatingPoint.cs (AlmostEqual).
Bounded LRU helper (paired with MemoryMRUCache). Ported via Util/Collections/LruCache.cs.
Seekable gzip stream. NOT PORTED — not used by core msconvert path.
Use System.Xml.XmlWriter. SKIPPED.
